metadata.file_name: Billy Joel - It's Still Rock and Roll to Me.flac
metadata.title: It's Still Rock and Roll to Me
metadata.lyrics:
[00:07.53] What's the matter with the clothes I'm wearing?
[00:10.37] Can't you tell that your tie's too wide?
[00:14.45] Maybe I should buy some old tab collars?
[00:17.12] Welcome back to the age of jive
[00:21.32] Where have you been hidin' out lately, honey?
[00:24.18] You can't dress trashy 'til you spend a lot of money
[00:27.79] Everybody's talkin' 'bout the new sound
[00:30.50] Funny, but it's still rock and roll to me
[00:33.97] 
[00:36.73] What's the matter with the car I'm driving?
[00:39.26] Can't you tell that it's out of style?
[00:43.46] Should I get a set of white wall tires?
[00:46.09] Are you gonna cruise the miracle mile?
[00:50.42] Nowadays, you can't be too sentimental
[00:53.18] Your best bet's a true baby blue continental
[00:56.78] Hot funk, cool punk, even if it's old junk
[01:00.06] It's still rock and roll to me
[01:04.23] Oh, it doesn't matter what they say in the papers
[01:08.23] 'Cause it's always been the same old scene
[01:11.54] There's a new band in town
[01:13.27] But, you can't get the sound from a story in a magazine
[01:18.75] Aimed at your average teen
[01:22.30] 
[01:24.39] How about a pair of pink sidewinders
[01:26.98] And a bright orange pair of pants?
[01:31.03] Well, you could really be a Beau Brummell baby
[01:33.76] If you just give it half a chance
[01:37.50] Don't waste your money on a new set of speakers
[01:40.77] You get more mileage from a cheap pair of sneakers
[01:44.08] Next phase, new wave, dance craze, anyways
[01:47.41] It's still rock and roll to me
[01:50.67] Alright, Richo!
[01:54.11] 
[02:13.20] What's the matter with the crowd I'm seeing?
[02:15.95] Don't you know that they're out of touch?
[02:19.84] Well, should I try to be a straight 'A' student?
[02:22.45] If you are, then you think too much
[02:26.37] Don't you know about the new fashion, honey?
[02:29.18] All you need are looks and a whole lotta money
[02:32.44] It's the next phase, new wave, dance craze, anyways
[02:35.97] It's still rock and roll to me
[02:39.47] Everybody's talkin' 'bout the new sound
[02:42.18] Funny, but it's still rock and roll to me
[02:43.55]
